title: Add Site Photos column, Point of Contact, and Project Manager fields

requirements.text: In the PDF report table layout, add a SITE PHOTOS column positioned immediately before the SIGNATURE column. The column should display the uploaded site photo thumbnails (as embedded base64 images) in the generated PDF.

quotes: Add SITE PHOTOS column before the SIGNATURE column.

acceptanceCriteria: The generated PDF includes a SITE PHOTOS column header
The SITE PHOTOS column appears to the left of the SIGNATURE column
Uploaded site photos are rendered as embedded images within the SITE PHOTOS column cells in the PDF

requirements.text: Add POINT OF CONTACT and PROJECT MANAGER name input fields to the ReportForm. These fields should capture text values, persist to localStorage alongside other form data, and be included in the generated PDF report.

quotes: Add POINT OF CONTACT and PROJECT MANAGER names

acceptanceCriteria: ReportForm displays a labeled 'Point of Contact' text input field
ReportForm displays a labeled 'Project Manager' text input field
Both fields persist their values to localStorage
Both fields' values appear in the generated PDF report under project info or a dedicated section
Fields are cleared/reset when the form is reset

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Maintain existing dark industrial visual theme and styling conventions
nonGoals: Backend storage of form data — the app remains fully client-side
Adding any new authentication or user management features
Changing the existing PDF layout beyond the specified column addition and new fields
